definition.title: Email Drafter
definition.description: Draft a professional email with configurable parameters.

inputs.name: recipient
inputs.description: Who the email is addressed to

inputs.name: include_signature
inputs.description: Whether to add a closing signature

steps.title: Draft Email
steps.content:
Write an email to {{recipient}} with subject "{{subject_line}}".

Use a {{tone}} tone and keep it under {{max_length}} words.

Include a signature: {{include_signature}}.
